overall.description: A hooded character in a white cloak walks through a misty mountain valley at dusk in a high-fidelity video game scene. The journey progresses from a narrow rocky canyon to an open valley path lined with wooden fencing, under a dramatic cloudy sky with warm golden-hour hues.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage with steep cliff walls

agents.ego_description: hooded character walking steadily through the narrow canyon with rocky walls on both sides

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face forming the left wall of the canyon
steep rock formation lining the right side of the path
distant misty mountains visible through the canyon opening
muddy trail winding through the canyon floor
dark stormy clouds with warm orange sunset highlights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow mountain canyon with steep rock walls flanking both sides of a dirt path. The hooded character walks forward through the misty passage toward distant mountains, under a dramatic cloudy sky with warm dusk lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: opening mountain valley with grassy slopes and scattered trees

events.description: canyon opens up to wider valley as right rock wall gives way to grassy terrain

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the environment opens into a wider valley with increased vegetation

entered.detail: sloped grassland replacing the rocky wall on the right side
scattered trees with reddish autumn foliage on the left slope

segments.scene_description: The path widens into an open valley as the right rock wall recedes and is replaced by grassy slopes. The character continues walking forward with more sky visible overhead, passing scattered autumn trees while the left cliff remains visible at a greater distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain valley path with wooden fencing on the right

events.description: wooden fence posts become visible along the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the valley path approaching a wooden fence line on the right

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence posts and rails lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a wooden fence running along the right side of the path, marking the edge of the trail. The left rock formations fade into the distance as the valley opens further, with the path leading toward the misty mountains under the dramatic sunset sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a restrictive mountain canyon that gradually expands into a wide, open valley at dusk. It begins with a hooded character walking along a dirt path flanked by steep, towering rock walls under a dramatic cloudy sky. As the character progresses, the right wall recedes to reveal rolling grassy slopes and scattered autumn trees, allowing more of the warm sunset light to fill the frame. The scene then opens further as the left cliffs fade into the distance, shifting the focus toward a wooden fence that now lines the right side of the trail. Finally, the path stretches forward into the vast landscape, leading the character toward the misty mountains under the glowing horizon.
